sourceAmbiguity: The backend grant contract does not prescribe a concrete mobile shell.
decisionTaken: Implemented a 430px one-column Mobile_Continuation_Pulse shell with persistent header, progress, save chip, and sticky action dock.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The prompt requires mobile-first constraints and visible progress/save/dominant action affordances.
operationalRisk: Future shared-shell work may need to replace local styling tokens.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Move primitives into a shared package once cross-channel continuation parity lands.
